eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Chelan, WA; at 5:22 PM on JUN 6, 2026 Effective until 7:22 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Shelan County Sheriff WILDFIRE WARNING, Level 2 Evacuation Advisory in Chelan Falls. The affected area is Chelan Falls, West of 4th, Wyoming St and the south end of 3rd st. Roads and evacuation routes can become blocked. If you do not leave now, you could be trapped, injured, or killed. For updates check Local Radio, TV or the Chelan County Emergency Management Web site and Face book.
Repeat.
Shelan County Sheriff WILDFIRE WARNING, Level 2 Evacuation Advisory in Chelan Falls. The affected area is Chelan Falls, West of 4th, Wyoming St and the south end of 3rd st. Roads and evacuation routes can become blocked. If you do not leave now, you could be trapped, injured, or killed. For updates check Local Radio, TV or the Shelan County Emergency Management Web site and Face book. Please monitor local radio stations and Chelan County Emergency Management Facebook for updates.
